title: hordelymus caput-medusae
intro: Hordelymus caput-medusae, also known as False Oat-grass, is a plant species within the Poaceae family. It is a perennial grass native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Hordelymus caput-medusae are primarily focused on its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. Herbal preparations of this plant are used to treat digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, and it can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures.
